mnemonics: Just Label It (JLabel) - Imagine creating a name tag (label) for a picture frame (ImageIcon) at an art gallery.
keyPoints: JLabel is a component for displaying text, images, or both on a GUI.
ImageIcon is a class used to encapsulate images (like PNG, JPEG, GIF) that can be displayed on JLabel components.
A JLabel can be created with an ImageIcon object passed to its constructor to display an image.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to add the JLabel to a container (like a JPanel or JFrame) after creating it, making it invisible.
Using an incorrect file path for the ImageIcon, resulting in a null image and no display.
